title: adonis autumnalis var. baetica
intro: Adonis autumnalis var. baetica, also known as the Autumn Crocus or Striped Meadow Saffron, is a plant species in the Paeoniaceae family, characterized by its striking purple and yellow striped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adonis autumnalis var. baetica include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers and roots are often dried and used as a spice or added to teas and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
